name: Journalytix
description_short: Real-time futures trading journal with automated trade logging, risk analytics, and news integration for NinjaTrader users.
description_long:
Journalytix is a specialized trading journal built primarily for futures traders, with deep integration into NinjaTrader and other popular futures platforms. Unlike most journals that work with post-trade data, Journalytix captures and analyzes your trades in real-time as they happen.

The platform automatically logs every trade, tracks your risk exposure, and overlays economic news events on your trade timeline so you can see how macro events affected your decisions. The built-in leaderboard adds a competitive element that motivates traders to improve their consistency.

Journalytix uses a single-tier pricing model at $47/month or $399/year, giving every subscriber access to all features. It is particularly popular among prop firm futures traders and NinjaTrader users who need real-time journaling without manual data entry.
pros: Real-time trade logging eliminates manual entry
News overlay shows macro impact on your trades
Single tier means all features for everyone
cons: Higher price point at $47/mo with no free tier
